ksa_text: Skill in implementing continuous security monitoring of AI systems in production, including observability for security events, detection of anomalies, and identification of security control failures.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: skill maps directly to Post-Market Monitoring Manager scope — RSK-specific signals detected ("monitoring.{0,10} ?:program|system|framework|protocol", "continuous.{0,10}monitor", "detect.{0,15} ?:drift|degradat|anomal"). STRM composite is zero (0.0000 — note: STRM frameworks underweight pure risk vocabulary); note that framework scores routinely underweight risk management and governance vocabulary, so text-based signal carries primary weight here. Seniority is appropriate: the KSA describes practice-level execution, not enterprise strategy.
